rationale: In the citing paper, Dawar and Pillutla (2000) appears as part of a grouped citation in the literature-classification table for prior product-harm crisis work at the individual level. The main text does not engage this specific study's expectations-based mechanism or findings in developing the DASVAR model, hypotheses, or empirical interpretation. Its role is broad background/context while positioning product-harm literature relative to the paper's service-crisis focus.
